description: Queries M-26-14 compliance posture metrics and classification audit records using ES|QL. Supports querying m_26_14-data-classification-requests for unclassified data streams and m_26_14-metrics-* for maturity score time series. Use for POA&M drafting, ATO risk narrative, and compliance gap identification.

configuration.query: FROM m_26_14-metrics-alert-coverage,m_26_14-metrics-asset-coverage,m_26_14-metrics-retention | WHERE @timestamp >= NOW() - ?lookback | STATS count = COUNT(*), latest = MAX(@timestamp) BY metric_type, state | SORT latest DESC | LIMIT ?limit

lookback.description: Time lookback period in ES|QL duration format. Examples: 7d (7 days), 30d (30 days), 90d (90 days).

limit.description: Maximum number of aggregated results to return. Default: 50.
